personal_affiliations.summary: Beth Saunders was promoted to the position of Executive Vice President within the FOX News Media editorial team.

personal_affiliations.relationship: Chief Executive Officer of FOX Television Stations
personal_affiliations.summary: Jack Abernethy serves as the Chief Executive Officer for FOX Television Stations.
Jay Wallace has been with FOX News Channel since its inception in 1996 and currently serves as the President and Executive Editor of FOX News Media.

personal_affiliations.relationship: Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer
personal_affiliations.summary: Joseph Dorrego serves as the CFO and COO of FOX News Media.

personal_affiliations.relationship: Executive Chair and Chief Executive Officer
personal_affiliations.summary: Lachlan Murdoch is the Executive Chair and CEO of Fox Corporation, the parent company of Fox News. He took sole control of the companies following a family trust transition.
Mary Wells is identified in organizational charts as the Chief Executive Officer of Fox News Network.

personal_affiliations.relationship: Executive Vice President, Morning Programming & Program Development
personal_affiliations.summary: Megan Albano serves as the Executive Vice President for Morning Programming and Program Development at Fox News.
Rupert Murdoch, the long-time leader of News Corp and 21st Century Fox, transitioned to the role of Chairman Emeritus for both FOX Corporation and News Corp in 2023.
Sharri Berg serves as the President of FOX Weather, a subsidiary unit of Fox News.

personal_affiliations.relationship: Chief Executive Officer of FOX News Media
personal_affiliations.summary: Suzanne Scott is the CEO of FOX News Media, overseeing Fox News Channel and its related linear networks.

political_affiliations.summary: Fox News is frequently analyzed and rated as having a conservative political bias, with its programming often overrepresenting conservative positions.
Studies on the 'Fox News Effect' suggest the network's introduction increased Republican vote shares and persuaded non-Republican viewers to vote for Republican candidates.
Multiple media bias rating organizations, including Ad Fontes Media and AllSides, classify Fox News's content and website as 'Skews Right' or 'Right'.

financial_affiliations.summary: BlackRock, Inc. is one of the top institutional holders of Fox Corporation stock.
Fox News generates approximately 65% of its revenue from fees negotiated with cable providers.
Dodge & Cox is a significant institutional shareholder in Fox Corporation, holding millions of shares.
Fox News is a primary subsidiary of Fox Corporation, a publicly traded media company managed through segments including Cable Network Programming.
GlaxoSmithKline is identified as one of the top advertisers on Fox News.
Liberty Mutual is listed among the leading brands that purchase advertising space on Fox News.
The Murdoch family maintains control of Fox Corporation through a family trust, which holds a significant percentage of voting shares.
State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries, such as SSgA Funds Management, are among the largest institutional owners of Fox Corporation.
The Vanguard Group is a major institutional shareholder of both Class A and Class B Fox Corporation stock.
Fox News receives funding from a wide range of sponsors, including major brands like General Motors, P&G, and various smaller up-and-coming entrepreneurs.
